# Memova Company Memory Book v0.5

Audience: internal Memova team and authorized agents
Visibility: Direct Link · Noindex
Updated: 2026-07-19
Human entry: index.html
Machine contract: manifest.json

## What this artifact is

This website is both a company product book and a Memova product demo. It turns company Context into canonical Markdown Pages and readable HTML projections. Pages are grouped into four Chapters inside one Book; the Book is a seed of the company Memory Library.

## Read in this order

0. content/library-home.md
1. content/user-manifesto-future-of-being-remembered.md
2. content/memova-now.md
3. content/product-model.md
4. content/experience-sharing.md
5. content/foundations.md
6. content/product-system.md
7. content/memory-interfaces.md
8. content/evolution.md
9. content/open-questions.md

## Chapters

- Chapter 01 / user-manifesto / MANIFESTO
  - user-manifesto-future-of-being-remembered
- Chapter 02 / first-wedge / CURRENT
  - memova-now
  - product-model
  - experience-sharing
- Chapter 03 / why-memova / FOUNDATION
  - company-foundations
  - product-system
  - memory-interfaces
- Chapter 04 / how-we-got-here / EVIDENCE and OPEN
  - evolution
  - open-questions

## Authority rule

CURRENT > MANIFESTO > FOUNDATION > EVIDENCE > HISTORICAL > OPEN

When statements conflict, follow `manifest.json`. CURRENT pages define confirmed scope. The manifesto defines the durable user promise but does not silently expand MVP scope. OPEN pages are questions, not facts.

## Current product in one paragraph

Memova’s first sharp wedge is for founders: turn voice, meetings, ideas, and project Context into a private Page worth saving or sharing. The user may keep it private, create an isolated HTML share, or generate platform-ready distribution assets after confirmation. Related Pages automatically form Books and feed a personal Memory Library. Multi-platform posting is a capability; the product is a personal publisher and memory system.

## Exclusion

The raw Memo #000001 philosophy archive is deliberately excluded from v0.5 navigation, manifest, sources, and package. Historical copies remain preserved outside this version.
